content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

November 7, 2005

Jan Sproull
GRVNC District 2 Representative
P.O. Box 952
Venice, CA 90294-0252

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-219

Dear Ms. Sproull:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice of October 26, 2005 and your written communications of October 28, 2005, and November 5, 2005. Your inquiry primarily presents open meeting law issues which are outside the purview of the Political Reform Act ("Act")¹ and should be redirected to the Attorney General’s office or your local district attorney’s office. Under the provisions of regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), copy enclosed, any request not meeting the requirements for formal written advice, must be declined by this agency. The Enforcement Division will respond separately.

Should you need assistance in the future, you may contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

Enclosure
JWW:rd

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18996, of the California code of Regulations.
